official_standard.overall: Racy, low-slung style built for speed and agility. Short legs with a dachshund-like silhouette, but average body size (5-9 lbs).
official_standard.personality: Extremely social, energetic, and playful. Known for sitting up on hind legs like a rabbit. Intelligent and capable of learning fetch or walking on a leash. 'Hoarder' tendency to hide shiny objects.

physical_traits.head: Modified wedge with gently rounded contours.
physical_traits.ears: Broad at the base with slightly rounded tips.
physical_traits.legs: Short and evenly set, slight bowing permitted.
physical_traits.tail: Tapers to a rounded tip, carried upright when moving.
physical_traits.coat: Shorthair (dense and resilient) or Longhair (soft and silky).
